description: PR introduces an f-string SQL query in a user-lookup function. Expected: agent surfaces a CRITICAL security finding for SQL injection via f-string interpolation, cites the security guidelines.

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,16 @@
     pass
 
+def get_user_by_id(user_id):
+    """Look up a user by ID. NOTE: vulnerable demo."""
+    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = {user_id}"
+    cursor = db.cursor()
+    cursor.execute(query)
+    return cursor.fetchone()
+
+

negative_assertions.rationale: The patch does not introduce style issues; flagging style here would be a false positive.
Note: this negative assertion targets get_user_safe (the parameterized version on line ~17). The agent should NOT flag the parameterized version as vulnerable. Match by line tolerance window.
